category_sources: Official GitHub README describes JLog/libjlog as a durable message queue with multiple subscribers and publishers.
source_facts.description says it is a pure C message queue for logs.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README title is JLog.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository exposes README and CONCEPTS.md as project documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo was intentionally not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README describes libjlog as pure C, durable, and multi-subscriber/multi-publisher.
source_facts.description identifies a C message queue for logs with subscribers and publishers.
